expectations.text: Maps CIS Controls 1-8 to NIST CSF 2.0 functions with category identifiers
expectations.evidence: Maps all 8 controls to NIST CSF 2.0 functions with category IDs

expectations.text: Correctly identifies Control 8 as the primary Detect function coverage in Controls 1-8
expectations.evidence: Identifies Control 8 as only Detect-function control in 1-8

expectations.text: States that Controls 1-2 map to the Identify function (ID.AM)
States that Controls 3-6 map primarily to the Protect function (PR.DS, PR.AA)
expectations.evidence: Maps Controls 3-6 to PR.DS and PR.AA categories

expectations.text: Recommends Control 13 for fuller NIST CSF Detect coverage
expectations.evidence: Recommends Control 13 for full Detect function coverage
